color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Web SPA
[Container: Vite + React 18]
Host dashboard (auth, onboarding,
services, bookings, wallet) and public
storefront/checkout pages. Static site.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
API
[Container: NestJS 11 / Express]
Auth guard, host/public/payments
modules. REST JSON. Verifies
Supabase JWTs; webhooks HMAC-verified.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Postgres
[Container: bookmi schema]
Supabase-hosted, Drizzle ORM.
host_profiles, bookings,
payment_transactions, wallet_ledger...

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Redis / BullMQ
[Container: Redis 7]
Backs the email send queue
(and future async job queues).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Supabase Auth
[External System]
JWT issuance, OAuth, email OTP

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SMTP Provider
[External System]
Mailhog in dev; Resend/SES/
Mailgun in prod
